Training & Education Certificate Ceremony 2082 BS

Drone Competency Certificate & Scholarship Distribution 2082

Twenty-five talented participants received drone competency certificates at a ceremony organized at the Film Development Board — empowering Nepal's next generation of drone professionals.

location_on Film Development Board, Kathmandu
groups 25 Graduates
25 Certificates Awarded
FDB Training Partner
2082 BS Ceremony
Youth Empowerment
Ceremony Recap

Ceremony Highlights

The distribution marked the successful completion of UDAAN-supervised drone training, recognizing skill, dedication, and readiness to operate safely and professionally across Nepal's growing unmanned aviation sector.

Scholarship support alongside certification reflects UDAAN's commitment to youth empowerment and accessible pathways into the drone industry.

  • verified 25 certificates awarded to graduates of the Film Development Board drone training program
  • school Scholarship distribution supporting talented participants pursuing careers in drone operations and film industry applications
  • location_on Held at the Film Development Board of Nepal — strengthening ties between aviation training and Nepal's creative industries
